actions.name: Open New Window with a temporary profile

items.name: 2. Reddit - The heart of the internet - Brave
Toggle Floating
items.description: Toggle floating state of active window

items.name: Swap Left
items.description: Swap with window on the left

items.name: Swap Right
items.description: Swap with window on the right

items.name: Focus Last Window
items.description: Switch between current and last focused window

items.name: Focus Urgent Window
items.description: Focus urgent window or last focused

items.name: Move Workspace to Monitor
items.description: Move current workspace to next monitor

items.name: Swap Workspaces Between Monitors
items.description: Swap active workspaces between two monitors

items.name: Create/Dissolve Group
items.description: Make current window a group, or dissolve if already grouped

items.name: Join Group Left
items.description: Add this window to the group on the left

items.name: Join Group Right
items.description: Add this window to the group on the right

items.name: Join Group Up
items.description: Add this window to the group above

items.name: Join Group Down
items.description: Add this window to the group below

items.name: Remove from Group
items.description: Move window out of its group

items.name: Move Cursor to Corner
items.description: Move cursor to corner of active window

items.name: Move to Scratchpad
items.description: Move active window to special workspace
